checklist_details.item: stitch-game-client 整合报告，无未解决问题
checklist_details.evidence: stitch-game-client-report.json unresolved=[]

api_discoveries: Auth endpoint requires platform field (ios/android/taptap); spec body was missing this field
Save route is GET/PUT /v1/save/:playerId (not /v1/save); PUT requires client_updated_at field
IAP SKUs are small_pack(60gs)/medium_pack(200gs)/large_pack(600gs)/mega_pack(1400gs)/monthly_card/starter_pack — not glowstone_N as spec assumed
IAP response returns glowstone_granted and updated_currency.glowstone; client must use these fields to compute delta and credit player
